sourceNote: TCGplayer Authentication Center study, read directly from the primary article (Peter Day, updated 2025-02-27): more than 8,000 Paldea Evolved booster packs opened, per-tier rates with 95% confidence intervals — Double Rare 13.72% ±0.73, Ultra Rare 6.64% ±0.53, Illustration Rare 7.70% ±0.56, Special Illustration Rare 3.17% ±0.37, Hyper Rare 1.76% ±0.28. Paldea Evolved's rates are within 0.1% of the Scarlet & Violet base set — the generous early-era odds — but its larger high-rarity pool (36 IRs, 15 SIRs, 9 HRs) makes any one specific card harder to complete. No ACE SPEC tier — that rarity did not return until Temporal Forces (sv5).
